Notice Of Motion For Order Quashing Service Of Process And Vacating Default, Default Judgment, And Order Appointing Receiver
Off Calendar Mar-09-2005 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Christina Y. Chen, Esq., 415-362-0207, for defendant Lai Tao Young
Malcolm Yeung, Esq., and Gen Fujioka, Esq., Asian Law Caucus, 415-896-1701, for plaintiff and opposing party 45 Ross Alley Residents Association
Edmond Lui, interpreter for (defendant) in the language Cantonese-Toi-Shan
Lai Tao Young, defendant and moving party.

EVIDENTIARY HEARING:
11:43am-All above appearances and court staff present. Edmond Lui, Interpreter, sworn. Defendant's witness Lai Tao Young sworn and examined. (1st, 2nd & 3rd declarations of Ms. Young)
12:45AM-break.
12:59PM-hearing resumed. Plaintiff's witness Hoi-Yee Chung sworn and examined.
(POS dated 6/8/04 by witness Chung)
1:27PM-Malcolm Young is sworn and examined.
1:30PM-Defense witness David Ho sworn and examined. 1:38PM
(Defense exhibit A marked-Sharper Image receipt)
2:15PM-Closing arguments. The Court ruling is as follows:
DEFENDANT LAI YOUNG'S Motion For Order Quashing Service Of Process is denied. Defendant Lai Young's Motion to Vacate Default and Default Judgment is denied. The motion for Order Appointing Receiver is denied. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Malcolm Yeung, Esq., Asian Law Caucus, (415) 896-1701, for Plaintiffs and Moving Parties 45 Ross Alley Residents Association, Ce Min Zhu, So San Kwong, Wai Hon Yee, Yan Qing Huang, So Ling Kwong, Kwock Po Yee, Lan Ye Kong, Zhen Cao Liao, Deng Chen Xie, Amy Wong, Feng Rong Zhou, Jian Zhong Tan, and Rishen Zhong
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. Attorney Yeung informed the Court that parties stipulated to continue this motion in light of defendant's counsel's substitution into the case recently. Parties also stipulated to substitute CATHERINE LAM as receiver. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. STIPULATION TO SUBSTITUTE CATHERINE LAM AS NEW RECEIVER IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. (301/JLW) Reporter: Rhonda Fung, CSR #4819

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-30-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patty Lee Hubble.
Malcolm Yeung, Esq. for Plaintiffs: 45 Ross Alley Residents Assoc, et al.,
Plaintiff's witness: Feng Rong Zhou, present with Cantonese Interpreter: Bonnie Shiu, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented and considered all the declarations submitted, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defendant: Lai Tao Young as follows: Defendant shall, within two weeks of the judgment, pay PG & E the out standing and unpaid utility charges for the property located at 45 Ross Alley, San Francisco.
For the next 7 years form the date of this judgment, defendant shall pay all utilities for the residential portions of Ross Alley in a timely manner to prevent the termination of utilities to any residential portion of Ross Alley.
Money judgment for damages in the sum of $29,701.11
Attorney's Fees $29,375.00
Costs $292.50.
Interest as provided by law.
Judgment signed in open court.
